title: Electrician
description: Educational puzzle game designed as part of a bachelor thesis to teach fundamental circuit concepts through interactive gameplay.
The game translates basic electrical principles into gameplay mechanics, where players solve progressively complex circuit-based puzzles to advance through levels.

Core design focuses on learning through interaction, requiring players to understand and apply circuit logic rather than memorizing concepts, with mechanics structured around experimentation, problem-solving, and immediate feedback.
The project is both designed and developed independently, covering gameplay systems, level design, and implementation.
